name: EMA200 MACD Macro Momentum
edge_hypothesis: EMA_200 is proven to amplify transitional alpha (EMA200 Vortex v2 trans PF=4.321, the system record). But that test used Vortex as confirmation. This spec tests whether EMA_200's macro-trend filtering works with MACD histogram instead — a simpler, more liquid signal. The hypothesis: when close crosses above EMA_200, a major regime shift is underway. MACD histogram positive at that moment confirms the shift has momentum. This targets rare but high-conviction macro transitions where the market crosses a major structural level with genuine force. Unlike EMA_200 as a static filter (close > EMA_200), here the CROSSING is the signal — the exact bar where price transitions through the 200-period structural level.

variants.name: ema200_macd_v1_cross_8to1
variants.description: Core thesis: EMA_200 price crossing + MACD histogram positive. 8:1 R:R. The crossing IS the signal — catching exact macro regime transitions.

components.notes: EMA_200 — macro structural level. Price crossing this is a rare, high-conviction regime transition event.
MACD histogram positive = momentum confirms the macro crossing has force behind it.
ATR-based R:R. Wider 2x stop for macro plays to survive initial volatility.

variants.name: ema200_macd_v2_hcross_8to1
variants.description: Both signals cross simultaneously: close crosses EMA_200 + MACD histogram crosses zero. Maximum confluence — both the structural break and momentum birth happen on same bar. Fewest entries but highest conviction.

components.notes: MACD histogram zero-cross — simultaneous momentum birth. Maximum confluence filter.

indicator_roles.baseline: EMA_200 — 200-period exponential MA. The macro structural level in any market. Price crossing this is a regime transition event, not noise.
indicator_roles.confirmation: MACDh_12_26_9 — MACD histogram. Confirms the macro crossing has genuine momentum, not a wick-driven false break.
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework. Wider stops (2x) for macro plays.
